zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Monteith Erskine於1462年出生在英國時，她的父親Lord John Bradburne37歲，母親Anne Vernon29歲。她於1484年與William Webster Sr.在英國萊希斯特斯爾可希頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1490年在她的家鄉享年28歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Monteith Erskine于1462年出生在英国时，她的父亲Lord John Bradburne37岁，母亲Anne Vernon29岁。她于1484年与William Webster Sr.在英国萊希斯特斯爾可希頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1490年在她的家乡享年28岁。

nameMeanings.name: Erskine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the barony of Erskine in Renfrewshire, first recorded in 1226 in the form Erskyn.
History: A family of this name have held a number of Scottish titles, including the earldoms of Mar, Buchan, Kellie, and Rosslyn.

variants.name: Erskin
meanings: Scottish (central Scotland and Fife): variant of   Erskine  . This form of the surname is now more common in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

nameMeanings.name: Monteith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the earldom and province of Menteith in Perthshire, named in Gaelic as ‘hill pasture (above) the Teith’, from monadh ‘hill pasture’ + Teith, a river name of obscure origin. This name was introduced to Ulster at the time of the Plantation in the 17th century, where it is now quite numerous in certain areas, particularly Tyrone.

variants.name: Montooth
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Monteith  .

variants.name: Mantooth
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish Monteith orMantach, a nickname from Gaelic manntach ‘stammering’(also ‘toothless’ in Irish), of which one early Welsh recorded form isMantath.

variants.name: Montieth
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire): variant of   Monteith   This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Monteith Erskine was born in 1462, in England, her father, Lord John Bradburne, was 37 and her mother, Anne Vernon, was 29. She married William Webster Sr. in 1484, in Cossington, Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1490, in her hometown, at the age of 28.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Monteith Erskine est née en 1462, à Angleterre, son père, Lord John Bradburne, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Anne Vernon, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé William Webster Sr. en 1484, à Cossington, Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1490, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 28 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Monteith Erskine 1462 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord John Bradburne 37 und ihre Mutter Anne Vernon 29. Sie hat 1484 in Cossington, Leicestershire, England William Webster Sr. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1490 im Alter von 28 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Monteith Erskine è nata il nel 1462 nel England, sua padre, Lord John Bradburne, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Anne Vernon, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato William Webster Sr. nel 1484, nel Cossington, Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1490, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 28 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Monteith Erskineが1462年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Lord John Bradburneは37歳，母Anne Vernonは29歳であった。1484年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアコシントンでWilliam Webster Sr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1490年に故郷で28歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Monteith Erskine(이)가 1462년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord John Bradburne(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Vernon(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1484년 영국 레이스스터실르 코징턴에서 William Webster Sr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1490년 그녀의 고향에서 28세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Monteith Erskine nasceu em 1462, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord John Bradburne, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Anne Vernon, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com William Webster Sr. em 1484, em Cossington, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1490, em sua cidade natal, com 28 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Monteith Erskine родилась в 1462 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Lord John Bradburne было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Vernon, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Webster Sr. в 1484 г. в местности коссингтон, лисестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1490 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 28 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Monteith Erskine nació en 1462, en Inglaterra, su papá, Lord John Bradburne, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Anne Vernon, tenía 29 años. Se casó con William Webster Sr. en 1484, en Cossington, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1490, en su pueblo, a la edad de 28 años.
